content:
Welcome to my new blog! This blog is built with Hugo and the PaperMod theme.
Code Highlighting Test Here is a simple Python snippet:
def hello_world(): print("Hello, Hugo!") if __name__ == "__main__": hello_world() Mermaid Diagram Test We can also render diagrams directly in Markdown:
graph TD; A[Start] --> B{Is it Hugo?}; B -- Yes --> C[Fast & Simple]; B -- No --> D[Slow & Complex]; C --> E[Happy Blogging!]; D --> E; Enjoy!
summary:
Welcome to my new blog! This blog is built with Hugo and the PaperMod theme.

Code Highlighting Test

Here is a simple Python snippet:

def hello_world():
    print("Hello, Hugo!")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    hello_world()

Mermaid Diagram Test

We can also render diagrams directly in Markdown:

graph TD;
    A[Start] --> B{Is it Hugo?};
    B -- Yes --> C[Fast & Simple];
    B -- No --> D[Slow & Complex];
    C --> E[Happy Blogging!];
    D --> E;

Enjoy!
title: Hello World: My First Blog Post
